channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Fnac est de retour avec les offres bonifiées sur ses cartes Fnac+ Jackpots pour avoir jusqu’à 90 € offerts dans votre cagnotte
item.description: C'est une offre qui revient de façon régulière mais qui a toujours son petit succès : en souscrivant une carte Fnac+, vous pouvez avoir 30, 60 ou 90 euros offerts dans votre cagnotte, seulement pour le prix de la carte.

item.title: How to watch Milan-San Remo 2026: Free Streams, TV Channels & Start Time
item.description: All the ways to watch Milano-Sanremo 2026 live streams online and from anywhere as Tadej Pogačar renews rivalries with Mathieu van der Poel.

item.title: The hidden trap of being a morning person
item.description: Three strategies for protecting yourself from burnout. If you wake up before sunrise ready to start the day, you’re not alone—and in many ways, the modern world is designed for you. Schools start early. Meetings begin at 8 a.m. And showing up first is still seen as a sign of dedication. Research from the University of Washington confirms this “early riser bias”: employees who start early are rated as more conscientious and receive higher performance evaluations, even when they work the same hours as colleagues who start later....

item.title: BTS The Comeback Live | Arirang: How to watch, start time, livestream details
item.description: How to watch BTS The Comeback Live | Arirang on March 21 at 7 a.m. ET. The live concert streams exclusively on Netflix.
